summary: Deep read: Kawamura et al. 2602.15307 (EUSIPCO 2026 submission). First systematic neuron-level MI of audio SSL (M2D ViT). AAPE metric: neuron class-specificity via entropy. Key: SSL achieves ~100% class coverage vs SL 49%; gender/language/arousal neurons shared across datasets; musical pitch neurons generalize across timbres; causal steering confirms functional role. Cite in Paper B §2.2 as prior neuron-level MI baseline. AAPE = neuron-level analog to AudioSAEBench M4 Isolate metric — confirms gap: no paper applies SAE features (vs neurons) to this analysis.
